name: CROSS_TOP_ORIGINS_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Top origins by target pair patent count.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)-[:ORIGIN_FROM]->(o:Origin)
RETURN o.name AS origin, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, origin
LIMIT 10;

examples: 某target pair在各来源地区分布如何？
